messages.author: Bostjan
messages.text: Do you think optimisation is the reason for that? - I'm facing same problem here
messages.content_html: Do you think optimisation is the reason for that? - I'm facing same problem here
messages.reply_html:
Random Citizen
I've got 32 hours without optimization without usage. And got 32 hours with optimization with usage. So all-in-all it's better. There are occasional timeouts on first TX if some time passed but I couldn't catch the cause yet.

messages.author: white_lightning
messages.text: I apologize if this has been brought up before, but is there no way to shutdown a repeater without removing power? I haven't found a command to do so. I was going to experiment with repeater placement using a Heltec V3 and would like to shut it down until I'm in position.
messages.content_html: I apologize if this has been brought up before, but is there no way to shutdown a repeater without removing power? I haven't found a command to do so. I was going to experiment with repeater placement using a Heltec V3 and would like to shut it down until I'm in position.

messages.author: ded (SalishMesh)
messages.text: No because there would be no way to turn it back on
messages.content_html: No because there would be no way to turn it back on

messages.author: white_lightning
messages.text: Thanks, and understand. I did consider the two commands you mentioned, but just wanted to make sure there was no alternative that I overlooked.
messages.content_html: Thanks, and understand. I did consider the two commands you mentioned, but just wanted to make sure there was no alternative that I overlooked.

messages.author: ded (SalishMesh)
messages.text: No nothing like that, but that's what I do when testing solar etc too. Just set advert intervals to 0 and turn repeat off. You can still login to admin but not trace it.
messages.content_html: No nothing like that, but that's what I do when testing solar etc too. Just set advert intervals to 0 and turn repeat off. You can still login to admin but not trace it.

messages.author: white_lightning
messages.text: Thanks
messages.content_html: Thanks
